body:
Thanks for the note, [Elena](people/elena-rossi) — really glad we had a chance to connect at the summit last week. I've been thinking more about the overlap between what Crossbeam is seeing at the growth stage and where we're playing at seed and Series A, particularly in climate infrastructure, and I do think there's a natural co-investment lane worth exploring. A few of the founders in our current cohort are starting to look ahead to their next raises, and having a trusted growth partner to warm introductions toward would be genuinely valuable. Would you be open to a 30-minute call sometime in the next two weeks so we can map out where our deal flow might complement each other? I'll have my assistant send over a few times if that works on your end.

Amara
